title: Project Hold Could Extend
description: CFO budget approval for restart is pending. If not approved by June, resource reallocation may be necessary.

title: Acquired Company Identity Not Integrated
description: 3 acquired companies have separate AD tenants not yet merged into Entra ID. Phase 2 is blocked until identity consolidation is complete.
mitigation: Identity consolidation plan to be scoped as separate work item
